versions.version_description: This version adds the intro to the songs, as well as the chords for the instrumental interludes.

tuning: D G C F A D

recommended.song_name: The Little Mermaid - Part Of Your World

content:
[Verse 1]

[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                               [ch]Am[/ch]
You think you own whatever land you land on[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                                 [ch]Em[/ch]
The earth is just a dead thing you can claim[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                              [ch]F6[/ch]
But I know every rock and tree and creature[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Dm[/ch]            [ch]G6[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]
has a life, has a spirit, has a name[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                             [ch]Am[/ch]
You think the only people who are people[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                              [ch]Em[/ch]
are the people who look and think like you[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                                [ch]F6[/ch]
But if you walk the footsteps of a stranger[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Dm[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
you'll learn things you never knew you never knew[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]                              [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]
Have you ever heard the wolf cry to the blue corn moon[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]                                 [ch]Em[/ch]
or asked the grinning bobcat why he grinned[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]
Can you sing with all the voices of the mountain[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F6[/ch]                               [ch]Am7add11[/ch]
Can you paint with all the colors of the wind[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Dm[/ch]                 [ch]F/G[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
Can you paint with all the colors of the wind[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                                [ch]Am[/ch]
Come run the hidden pine trails of the forest[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                                 [ch]Em[/ch]
Come taste the sun sweet berries of the earth[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                              [ch]F[/ch]
Come roll in all the riches all around you[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Dm[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]
and for once never wonder what they're worth[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                                [ch]Am[/ch]
The rain storm and the river are my brothers[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                                [ch]Em[/ch]
The heron and the otter are my friends[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                              [ch]F[/ch]
And we are all connected to each other[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Dm[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
in a circle in a hoop that never ends[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]
How high does the sycamore grow?[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dm[/ch]                       [ch]G6[/ch]
If you cut it down then you'll never know[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]                              [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]
And you'll never hear the wolf cry to the blue corn moon[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                              [ch]Em[/ch]
For whether we are white- or copper-skinned[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]
You need to sing with all the voices of the mountain[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F[/ch]                                [ch]Dm/A[/ch]
You need to paint with all the colors of the wind[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dm[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]
You can own the earth and still all you own is earth until[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
you can paint with all the colors of the wind[/tab]
